title: Toor Kebab with Pili Peri Sauce
description: This tangy, crisp Toor Kebab with Pili Peri Sauce is a unique and delightful solo dinner dish featuring toor dal, perfect for pescatarian-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: 1 cup Toor Dal (Split Yellow Lentils)
ingredients.notes: Rinse and soak for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp Pili Peri Sauce Mix (or substitute other spicy sauce mix available in the market)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add Toor Dal and cook until it absorbs the oil, about 5 minutes.
Stir in lime juice, bell pepper juice, green chili, garlic, and salt. Cover and simmer for another 10-12 minutes or until lentils are tender.
Remove from heat and mix Pili Peri Sauce into the Toor Dal mixture to taste.
Serve hot as a main course with crusty bread.
